description_long: This is a heavily armored, quadrupedal combat tactical vehicle with a robust, angular chassis and two large rotary cannons mounted on articulated arms extending from either side. The body is covered in dark, matte armor plating with visible panel lines, bolts, and reinforced sections, especially around the cockpit and leg joints. The legs are thick and mechanical, designed for stability and heavy load-bearing, with wide, flat feet for traction on urban surfaces. The front features a prominent cockpit area with a visor-like viewport and additional armor reinforcement, while the rear has exhaust ports and access panels. The vehicle's surface is adorned with a dark, mottled camouflage pattern and subtle military markings, including numbers and warning symbols. The overall design suggests a focus on urban combat, with high firepower, protection, and maneuverability.
description: A heavily armored, four-legged combat vehicle with dual rotary cannons, dark camouflage, and reinforced plating, designed for urban tactical operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cockpit, reinforced frontal armor, and both rotary cannons prominently.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the articulated arm and rotary cannon, as well as the vehicle's angular body and leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals exhaust ports, access panels, and the back of the armored chassis.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the rotary cannon and mechanical leg details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large rotary cannon mounts, one on each side of the main body, attached to articulated arms.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced sections on the front, cockpit, and leg joints; visible bolts and panel lines.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Dark, mottled camouflage pattern with green, black, and brown tones in irregular shapes.
attribute_military_markings: White alphanumeric codes on the front and sides, yellow warning symbols near weapon mounts.
